title: Incorrect result from a DISTINCT + GROUP BY + ORDER BY query
poc:
SELECT DISTINCT x
 FROM (SELECT x FROM t1 GROUP BY x)
 WHERE x='right'
 ORDER BY x;
description:
drh added on 2014-04-03 15:17:34:
The following query answers 'wrong' even though the correct answer is 'right':
CREATE TABLE t1(x);
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES('right'),('wrong');
SELECT DISTINCT x
 FROM (SELECT x FROM t1 GROUP BY x)
 WHERE x='right'
 ORDER BY x;
Bisecting shows that this problem was introduced by check-in
[1e64dd782a126f48d78c4] on 2014-02-08 and first appeared in
SQLite version 3.8.4.
key_bug_features: DISTINCT with GROUP BY and ORDER BY in query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(y TEXT NOT NULL, z INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
SELECT DISTINCT y FROM (SELECT y FROM t2 GROUP BY y HAVING z > 0) WHERE y='right' ORDER BY y;
CREATE TABLE t3(a REAL, b TEXT);
